scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @esp/backend" "npm run dev -w @esp/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @esp/backend && npm run build -w @esp/web
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,green "npm run start -w @esp/backend" "npm run start -w @esp/web"
